## Sprint Objective
Finalize regulated-ready tenancy model, white-label controls, and proprietary boundary strategy.

## In Scope
- Tenant isolation verification and cross-tenant test coverage.
- Compliance profile packaging and evidence export path.
- Product boundary definitions for open interfaces versus proprietary core.

## Sprint Backlog
- [ ] Implement and test tenant isolation controls.
- [ ] Publish compliance profile matrix and required controls by tier.
- [ ] Publish white-label boundary and extension model.
- [ ] Finalize BYOK and data residency options.
- [ ] Publish customer and operator runbooks for onboarding and incident response.

## Exit Criteria
- [ ] Tenant isolation tests pass with no critical findings.
- [ ] Compliance evidence bundle can be generated on demand.
- [ ] Product boundary approved by engineering, security, and product stakeholders.

- Parent: #014
- Depends on: #022
- Drives: #013
